## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` passed locally
- [ ] Button loading keeps original label text and uses `loading` prop (no text swap like `isLoading ? "저장 중..." : "저장"`)
- [ ] Docs page layout follows style guide (`space-y-12`, `header.not-prose`, header divider)
- [ ] UI blocks inside docs content are wrapped with `not-prose` where needed
- [ ] `Preview` and `CodeSnippet` examples are synchronized
- [ ] On-color mapping is correct for colored backgrounds (`on-primary` / `on-secondary` / destructive text contrast)
